prompt: Create a candid full-body street-event photograph at night of a fashionable young East Asian woman walking past a registration or security table outside a modern glass building. She is captured in profile with her body moving to the right while her head turns back toward the camera, giving a slightly surprised, neutral expression. She has long dark hair tied loosely in a low ponytail with stray strands around her face, natural makeup, and a slim silhouette. Outfit: a fitted white blazer, matching short pencil skirt, sheer pale tights, and glossy white pointed-toe stiletto heels; include a small light shoulder bag with a chain strap partly visible at her side. Environment: rainy urban night, wet reflective stone pavement, metal crowd-control barriers, a black check-in table on the right, event staff wearing dark clothing and blue lanyards handling wristbands, and a blue screen/sign in the background showing an AI-company-style logo and the text AnionAI. Add a crowd of people waiting in the dim background, blurred city lights and signage, strong on-camera flash lighting on the woman, high ISO documentary realism, vertical smartphone-like composition, 2:3 aspect ratio, slightly imperfect candid framing, realistic skin texture, realistic fabric folds, no glamour retouching, no studio lighting, no illustration style.
